headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -76.8)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 50% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 160 quotes, and an overwhelming 128 at strong intensity — people are venting hard and that high-intensity skew is driving the elevated score of 72.7.
• Frustrations are running well above the historical floor but still sit in the mid-range of a wide 187-day band (−0.3 to 172.0), suggesting this is a notably bad but not exceptional day.
• Both Fears and Optimism improved from yesterday but remain in negative territory, meaning general sentiment outside of frustrations is still quieter than average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
